authority_boundary.selection_rule: Future reconstruction should select coherent organs, not isolated mined rows.

shared_substrate_clusters.purpose: Substrate-centric routing overlay that exposes hidden prerequisites, cluster bundles, macro-only boundaries, and merge pressure across the mined pattern layer.

supersession_report.purpose: Human-readable fold, supersession, reframe, sibling-prerequisite, and macro-only posture report for future organ selection.

reconstruction_shortlist.purpose: Current organ-selection overlay that ranks coherent reconstruction organs by fixture feasibility, validator availability, private-state replacement cost, and routing value, with later ledger deltas routed as strengtheners.

fixture_feasibility_matrix.purpose: Human-readable fixture feasibility matrix for choosing coherent organs before any public-facing reconstruction.

organ_dependency_dag.purpose: Dependency-order overlay that makes prerequisite organs, child suborgans, macro-only boundaries, and reconstruction paths explicit against the current ledger snapshot.

route_decision_matrix.purpose: Current route-selection overlay that decides which pattern families select as roots, fold into parent organs, remain evidence-only, require private fixtures, or should never become standalone leaves.

organ_fixture_specs.purpose: Fixture-contract overlay that turns route decisions into coherent organ bundles with synthetic inputs, expected receipts, negative cases, anti-claims, hidden infrastructure, and standalone exclusions.

organ_route_cards.purpose: Compact task-shape route-card overlay that tells future agents which organ owns a family, which prerequisites and child folds travel with it, and which rows must not become standalone leaves.

row_to_organ_router.purpose: Reverse route overlay that starts from a pattern id, title shape, or ledger family and routes upward to the owning organ, prerequisites, and no-standalone posture.

route_readiness_audit.purpose: Leaf-preselector overlay that separates routable rows from organ-level readiness and blocks isolated pattern rows, private fixtures, macro-only wrappers, and child suborgans from becoming standalone leaves.

routing_semantics.pattern: A mined row that names a metabolism-changing behavior, surface, proof, or gate.
routing_semantics.organ: A coherent leaf-scale subsystem composed of multiple patterns that share fixture, validator, source boundary, and cold-start story.
routing_semantics.foundation: A prerequisite pattern family needed before downstream leaves make sense.
routing_semantics.runtime: A pattern family that moves work, status, agents, leases, or continuation state.
routing_semantics.projection: A pattern family that compiles source substrate into navigable or compressed views.
routing_semantics.proof: A pattern family that makes claims checkable through type checking, validators, fixtures, receipts, or diagnostic result boards.
routing_semantics.observability: A pattern family that records, attributes, compares, or audits behavior.
routing_semantics.self_improvement: A pattern family that lets local failures or operator pressure change doctrine under gates.
routing_semantics.continuity: A pattern family that survives context loss, phase shifts, or detached runtime handoff.
routing_semantics.private_fixture_only: A pattern that can be projected only through synthetic fixtures because the macro source is private-root evidence.
routing_semantics.macro_only: A pattern that should remain internal unless reframed into a non-private, non-packaging organ.
routing_semantics.control_surface: A pattern that composes runtime state across lanes into a bounded operator or agent control plane.

organ_clusters.thesis: Standards, principles, operators, strict JSON, and self-governing paper modules are one grammar organ; many executable-grammar rows are instances of this deeper parent.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Select this as a root organ early. Treat Lean proof as the strongest proof witness, but not as a substitute for the grammar organ.

organ_clusters.thesis: Navigation hologram, option-surface bands, semantic routing, entry leases, and projection receipts are one route-plane organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Do not pick the present public navigation leaves as roots. They are projections and fixtures of the larger route plane.

organ_clusters.thesis: Status authority, Task Ledger, mission transactions, work claims, scoped commits, and cap capture are one work-survival organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: This is root substrate, not a nice-to-have backlog feature. Reconstruction should show status changing through events, not only static cards.

organ_clusters.thesis: Bridge resume, controller heartbeat, continuation packet, phase slots, runtime events, and long-running queues form one continuity organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Select as one organ if the leaf can show yield-to-disk, heartbeat, wake, and phase transition in one small fixture.

organ_clusters.thesis: Agent entry rules, self-observation, route compliance, session attribution, hooks, actor axes, and context injection are one behavior-governance organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: This should not become a generic agent-observability demo. It should prove that route expectations and operator attention leases can steer later agent or operator behavior without exposing private thread bodies.

organ_clusters.thesis: Response-flight attempts, durable response-attention leases, HUD action proof receipts, and sidecar continuation lifecycle gates are one operator bridge child organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Do not select these rows as standalone browser/HUD leaves. Fold them into agent observability, external-boundary privacy, and bridge continuity until the synthetic response-attention fixture exists.

organ_clusters.thesis: Raw seed metabolism, doctrine population, concept/mechanism curation, correction survival, and recursive failure learning are one self-improvement organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Future public projection must use synthetic operator voice and synthetic vault material. Do not ship real raw seed or prompt content.

organ_clusters.thesis: Annex transfer, provider evaluator boundaries, human approval, market/data evidence, prompt shelf, and memory tiers are all boundary-management patterns.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Keep the organ internal unless it can be reframed around synthetic inputs and explicit anti-corruption adapters.

organ_clusters.thesis: Formal proof, source capsules, workingness, diagnostic specimens, test routing, compliance adapters, and metabolism status are one evidence organ.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: This is the strongest proof bundle only if it shows checks rejecting bad claims, not just successful examples.

organ_clusters.thesis: The cockpit and frontend capture contract are macro control surfaces; a public projection should be a synthetic typed-view specimen, not a copy of the live cockpit.
organ_clusters.selection_guidance: Keep macro-only until a tiny synthetic component index and capture fixture exists.

dependency_edges.why: Route packets and banned-route catalogs need standard-owned schemas.
Bands are useful only inside a first-contact route plane.
Omission receipts make lower-band projections reversible instead of lossy.
Generated projections need standards and validators to bind source-coupling receipts.
Semantic rank is a drilldown signal, not control authority.
Entry packets are the cold-start instance of the route plane.
Durable backlog state needs typed lifecycle authority.
Actionability discipline is the alerting rule inside status authority.
Transactions claim and land scoped work against durable subjects.
The board shape and transaction finalizer are the same organ from UI/runtime angles.
Detached continuation needs claim, lease, validation, and finalizer semantics.
Heartbeat is the liveness proof inside the continuity organ.
Continuation packet is the durable wake artifact.
Salvage/quarantine is the provider-output membrane inside bridge continuity.
Phase slots and bridge resume both preserve work across time boundaries.
The composition root consumes typed phase and orchestration state rather than reconstructing it ad hoc.
Observed behavior is meaningful only against expected route contracts.
Compliance audit is the checker over session trace events.
Attribution says which actor produced the observed behavior.
Hook ladders need hard resource membranes to avoid observer-plane recursion.
Manual trace structuring is an intake path into the observability plane.
Voice-derived claims need provenance without leaking raw source.
Voice archaeology is a third-substrate variant of voice-to-doctrine metabolism.
Population consumes routed pressure from the voice-to-shard lane.
The approved overlay is the reviewed membrane between proposal IR and authored doctrine.
Self-improvement needs a governed adoption lane.
Failure learning needs a test of whether behavior improved.
Green/amber/red mutation policy requires machine-verifiable workingness evidence.
Lean is the strongest instance of executable claim checking.
External patterns need a lane decision before becoming substrate.
Provider outputs are another external-input boundary with evaluator receipts.
Shelf and ledger are the artifact and evidence sides of one prompt organ.
Typed component capture is the fixtureable subset of the live cockpit.

supersession_recommendations.rationale: The self-governing standard is a proof witness inside the paper-module authoring runtime, not a separate leaf unless the fixture is specifically about recursive standard conformance.
The full row already names the deeper invariant and should supersede the earlier medium-novelty row.
Skill type plane, materialization, and cold-start pack are child proofs of typed skills.
The public-safe unit is the whole synthetic voice-to-doctrine chain; atomic raw-seed rows are not strong standalone leaves.
These are projection surfaces and receipts, not independent organs.
Omission receipt is the reversible-boundary rule that makes compact projections safe; it should be a parent edge inside the projection organ.
Release packaging should not drive the macro pattern layer. The stronger parent is a generic claim-strengthening/status gate.
Prompt shelf is the operator-facing artifact layer; prompt ledger is the evidence plane. They should become one synthetic prompt organ if selected.
Mission transaction is the deeper runtime invariant; boards and scoped commits are views/lanes over it.

structurally_weak_or_macro_only.recommendation: Do not select as a leaf unless reframed as generic claim-strengthening authority.
Keep as external-boundary support, not standalone.
Fold into voice/doctrine substrate with scrubbed fixtures only.
Macro-only until converted into a tiny synthetic typed-view specimen.
Use as fixture contract under the cockpit organ, not standalone.
Fold into executable grammar or provenance organ.
Use as root substrate support, not a leaf headline.
Use as proof fixture inside diagnostic evidence organ.
Keep as observability intake support unless a synthetic trace-structuring fixture is selected.
Keep macro-only unless lane snapshots are synthesized.
Project only through synthetic archaeology fixtures and coverage-check receipts.

next_type_a_pass.recommended_scope: Implement a small organ selector over this routing graph that proposes 6 to 8 reconstruction organs, then audits each organ for fixture feasibility, private-state replacement, root-substrate dependencies, and validator availability.
do_not_do: Do not append many new mined rows.
Do not rebuild public microcosm leaves.
Do not treat present/partial current_microcosm_status as authority.
